entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CALM WINDS

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
